query:
-- Check how TIAB SIM services are stored in the main services table
SELECT s.externalId, s.name, s.customerExternalId, s.supplier, s.serviceType,
       ts.tiabCustomerId, ts.reconStatus,
       tc.internalCustomerExternalId as tiabMatchedCustomer
FROM services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON s.externalId = ts.internalServiceExternalId
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId != tc.internalCustomerExternalId)
LIMIT 10;

-- Check how TIAB SIM services are stored in the main services table
SELECT s.externalId, s.name, s.customerExternalId, s.supplier, s.serviceType,
       ts.tiabCustomerId, ts.reconStatus,
       tc.internalCustomerExternalId as tiabMatchedCustomer
FROM services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON s.externalId = ts.internalServiceExternalId
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId != tc.internalCustomerExternalId)
LIMIT 10;
